# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

# [YAML Header]
apiVersion: "networking.istio.io/v1alpha3"  # Istio Networking API version (replace with the actual one)
kind: "EnvoyProxy"                             # Envoy Proxy kind definition, replace it as per your requirement if needed  
metadata:                                      # Metadata section for envoey proxy configuration. Replace this part according to need 
    name: "api-gateway-proxy"                   # Name of the service/instance (replace with actual value)    
spec:                                          # Specification Section, replace it as per your requirement if needed  
    targetRef:                                 # Reference section for envoey proxy configuration. Replace this part according to need 
        kind: "Cluster"                         # Kind is Cluster in Istio Networking API version (replace with the actual one)    
        name: "default-cluster"                 # Name of cluster, replace it as per your requirement if needed  
    listeners:                                   # Listeners section for envoey proxy configuration. Replace this part according to need 
      - port: 80                                # Port number (replace with actual value)    
        protocol: HTTP                          # Protocol type, replace it as per your requirement if needed  
    clusters:                                    # Clusters Section in Istio Networking API version. Replace this part according to need      
      - name: "default-cluster"                 # Name of cluster (replace with actual value)    
        connectTimeout: 5s                      # Connection timeout, replace it as per your requirement if needed  
    routeConfigs:                                # Routes section for envoey proxy configuration. Replace this part according to need     
       - match:                                 # Matching criteria in Istio Networking API version (replace with the actual one)    
           prefix: "/"                          # Prefix of request, replace it as per your requirement if needed  
         route:                                # Route definition for matched requests. Replace this part according to need 
            destination:                        # Destination section in Istio Networking API version (replace with the actual one)    
              host: "backend-service"           # Host name of backend service, replace it as per your requirement if needed
